meta.description: Maps Figma design tokens to HeroUI v3 CSS custom properties and source code
meta.versionNote: The Figma Kit uses HeroUI v2 naming conventions (content1-4, primary/secondary as brand colors). HeroUI v3 code uses a redesigned token system (surface/overlay/accent with oklch colors). Mappings document conceptual equivalence; actual color values differ between Kit and v3.

Primitives.description: Raw color palette (blue/purple/green/red/yellow/cyan/pink/zinc scales + flat variants) and spacing unit scale. Single mode — not theme-aware.

Tokens.description: Semantic tokens aliasing Primitives, with light and dark modes. Includes color tokens and layout constants (opacity, font sizes, line heights, radii, border widths).

changes: Added 'Emotions' icon category to Icons canvas (6441:72852)
Added 'Yours Truly Logo' component to Brand canvas (6410:197243)
Screens canvas restructured into 'Molecules' (6441:61697) and 'basic flow' (6441:76012) sections
New text color reference '#4A3552' on Button canvas (6407:187866)

primitives.description: Primitives collection — raw values not affected by theme mode.

tokens.description: Tokens collection — semantic, theme-aware. All color values resolved to hex.

content.description: Surface hierarchy (v2 terminology). content1=primary surface, content2=secondary, content3=tertiary, content4=quaternary.

base.description: Status/brand colors and their full shade scales.

flat.description: Semi-transparent flat/soft variants for components with soft variant.

tokenMappings.description: Figma token (v2 Kit) → HeroUI v3 CSS variable mappings. 'match' field: exact=same value, approx=similar value, conceptual=same concept with different value, N/A=no v3 equivalent.

colors.note: v3 uses off-white bg in light mode
v3 uses purple-tinted dark for eclipse
v3 uses opaque oklch; Figma uses alpha
Figma overlay = modal scrim. v3 --overlay is popup background color, not scrim.
NAMING: content1 → surface. Dark values differ (zinc vs purple-tinted).
Figma = zinc/300; v3 is much lighter
NAMING CHANGE: 'primary' → 'accent'. v3 uses a lighter blue.
REMOVED IN v3: purple secondary brand color dropped entirely
No exact v3 equivalent for default-soft
Used as focus ring at 20% opacity; v3 uses solid accent color for focus rings

components.description: Mapping between Figma component pages and HeroUI v3 source code. Figma pages: 31 | Repo-only (no Figma page yet): 54.

map.note: Figma design exists — no code implementation yet in HeroUI v3
Composed from Avatar + text layout, no dedicated CSS
HTML form wrapper with React Aria Forms integration
Numeric stepper input — different from Number Input in Figma which is older v2

map.notes: AI command bar with collapsed/expanded states. Contains PromptChip children when expanded.
Memory prompt card with type (memory|photo-story) and hover variants.
AI prompt suggestion chip used inside CommandBar.Panel.
Quick action button with default and active variants. Used in dashboard quick actions row.

v3CssTokens.description: CSS custom properties defined in packages/styles/themes/default/variables.css. These are the canonical HeroUI v3 design tokens used throughout the component CSS files. Total: 49 tokens from 49 light-mode vars and 27 dark-mode overrides.

demoTheme.description: YoursTruly demo app design tokens — extracted directly from Figma node 6408:187914 (Screens canvas) via get_variable_defs. These override HeroUI v3 defaults to create the YoursTruly brand identity. Implemented in packages/storybook/styles/globals.css.

primary.description: Deep purple — brand primary. Used for buttons, focus rings, nav active states.

pageBackground.description: Cream/yellow-50 — the distinctive YoursTruly page background.

yellow500.description: Amber — warning states and accent highlights.

purple300.description: Lighter purple — used for focus rings in dark mode.

secondary50.description: Very light purple tint — secondary surface.

radiusSmall.description: 12px radius used as base. Component-level sizes are derived via calc(var(--radius) * multiplier).

spacing.description: 4px base unit scale. Matches HeroUI v3 default --spacing: 0.25rem.

cssOverrides.description: Summary of how YoursTruly theme overrides HeroUI v3 defaults in globals.css.

figmaStyles.description: Figma named styles extracted via REST API. 204 total (201 returned). Includes shadow effects and typography. No color styles — colors are in Variables/Tokens collection.

shadowStyles.description: Named shadow/effect styles. Format: shadow/{color}/{size}. Sizes: base, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, inner. Colors: primary, secondary, success(green), warning(yellow), danger(red), neutral(zinc).

textStyles.description: Named text styles. Format: text-{size}/{leading}/{weight} and special names. Named sizes: text-tiny, text-small, text-medium, text-large.

screens.description: Screens canvas (6408:187914) — example application screens and molecules built with HeroUI components. Serves as visual reference for real-world component compositions. Added 2026-03-11, updated 2026-03-11.

Molecules.description: Reusable molecule-level components: navigation sidebar, card hover states, and app logo variants.

items.name: Navigation/Default
items.description: Sidebar navigation component: logo, grouped nav links (Account/Chat/Shop), support link, upgrade CTA, user avatar. Used as main app nav in all full-screen examples.

items.name: card 1
items.description: Knowledge card molecule with hover state: image, category chip, title, description, stats row (documents/images/files), avatar group.

items.name: card 2
items.description: Taller knowledge card molecule with hover state: image, category chip, title, multi-line description, stats row, avatar group.

items.name: custom
items.description: App logo component set with variants: google, AI, tokens, facebook. Used in navigation sidebar as branding element.

basic flow.description: Full 1440x1024 application screens showing complete UI flows for the 'Yours Truly' example app.

items.name: create account_login
items.description: Two-panel authentication screen. Left: brand panel with orange gradient, tagline 'Life Is Short / Make It Sweet', photo collage, social proof (70,000+ users + avatar group). Right: form with Google/Facebook OAuth buttons, Full Name/Email/Password inputs, privacy policy Checkbox, 'Sign Up' Button. Components: Button (primary + tertiary), Input, Label, Checkbox, Separator, Avatar.

items.name: Loading
items.description: Loading state screen with gradient background and Spinner.

items.name: Loading
items.description: Loading state screen with image background and Spinner.

items.name: new onboarding
items.description: Onboarding flow screen: welcome step with progress indicators and action buttons.

items.name: V2_gradient
items.description: Main application dashboard (gradient theme). Layout: sidebar Navigation (256px) + main content area. Top bar: Search Input + mood Badge ('Happy') + XP Badge ('100 XP'). Content: page title 'Myself', 'Add new' Button, Popular Recommendation section (horizontal Card scroll with carousel nav), Tabs ('My knowledge' / 'Shared with me') + Sort Dropdown + Search, Chip filters (All/Fishing/Military/Education/Parenting/Finance), knowledge Card grid with images. Right panel: AI writing prompt Card + Recommended tag Chips list. Components: Navigation sidebar, Input (search), Button, Tabs, Chip, Card, Avatar, Badge/Chip, Separator.

icons.description: Icon library documentation for HeroUI. The Figma Kit references gravity-ui icons via Iconify. Internally, packages/react/src/components/icons.tsx contains built-in SVG icons used by components. Updated 2026-03-11: added Emotions category (6441:72852).

recommendedLibrary.name: gravity-ui
recommendedLibrary.usage: @iconify/react or CSS mask-image with Iconify CDN

figmaCategories.name: Emotions
figmaCategories.description: Emotional expression and mood icons (emoji-style): happy, sad, angry, surprised, etc. Added 2026-03-11.

internalIcons.description: Internal SVG React components used by HeroUI components themselves (not for user consumption as a public icon library).
